debug_info.goal:
w v : ℕ
M R X : Type
inst✝⁴ : Fintype R
inst✝³ : DecidableEq (M × R)
inst✝² : DecidableEq X
inst✝¹ : SelectableType X
inst✝ : SelectableType R
ψ : X → HcV w v
μhat : HcV w v → ℝ
A : VCTCRAdversary M R X
⊢ let t := A.qChoose + A.qRespond;
  [=()|TCRGameROM ψ A].toReal ≤ ↑t * ∑ y, μhat y * μhat y

        have h₁₂ : (A.qChoose + A.qRespond : ℝ) * ((Finset.univ : Finset (HcV w v)).sum (fun y => (μhat y) * (μhat y))) ≥ ((Finset.univ : Finset (HcV w v)).sum (fun y => (μhat y) * (μhat y))) := by linarith
        have h₁₃ : ((Finset.univ : Finset (HcV w v)).sum (fun y => (μhat y) * (μhat y))) > 0 := h₉
        have h₁₄ : (A.qChoose + A.qRespond : ℝ) * ((Finset.univ : Finset (HcV w v)).sum (fun y => (μhat y) * (μhat y))) ≥ 1 := by
          -- Use the fact that the sum is positive and the product is at least the sum
          nlinarith

    linarith
  -- Combine the inequalities to get the final result
  have h₃ : ([= () | TCRGameROM (w := w) (v := v) (M := M) (R := R) (X := X) ψ A]).toReal ≤ (A.qChoose + A.qRespond : ℝ) * ((Finset.univ : Finset (HcV w v)).sum (fun y => (μhat y) * (μhat y))) := by
